name: oled_display_ssd1309
description: OLED SSD1309 display plugin for Volumio – shows playback info, clock, progress, audio format, and volume on a 128x64 I2C OLED
author: Zhapox

volumio_info.details: Drives a 128x64 SSD1309 I2C OLED display showing playback info, clock, progress bar, audio format, volume overlay, and screensaver. Designed for Raspberry Pi with zero MPD interference.
volumio_info.changelog: v1.7.21: Docs only. Install instructions updated to recommend 'volumio plugin install' from inside the extracted source folder, with the manual-extraction method kept as a fallback. v1.7.20: Reboot/shutdown lifecycle hooks use the correct Volumio method names (onVolumioReboot/onVolumioShutdown) so the display reliably powers off.
